mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE issuance_id = #{issuanceId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE ppe_type = #{ppeType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE ppe_type = #{ppeType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issuance WHERE issuance_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_issuance ( issuance_id, employee_id, employee_name, employee_dept, employee_email, work_place_id, ppe_type, ppe_type_en, ppe_type_zh, ppe_name, ppe_model, ppe_image_file_id, quantity, issuance_date, expiry_date, hazardous_factor, issuance_reason, received_signature, signature_date, notes, author_name, author_email, author_dept, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{issuanceId}, #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{employeeDept}, #{employeeEmail}, #{workPlaceId}, #{ppeType}, #{ppeTypeEn}, #{ppeTypeZh}, #{ppeName}, #{ppeModel}, #{ppeImageFileId}, #{quantity}, #{issuanceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hazardousFactor}, #{issuanceReason}, #{receivedSignature}, #{signatureDate}, #{notes}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_issuance SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, employee_dept = #{employeeDept}, employee_email = #{employeeEmail}, work_place_id = #{workPlaceId}, ppe_type = #{ppeType}, ppe_type_en = #{ppeTypeEn}, ppe_type_zh = #{ppeTypeZh}, ppe_name = #{ppeName}, ppe_model = #{ppeModel}, ppe_image_file_id = #{ppeImageFileId}, quantity = #{quantity}, issuance_date = #{issuanceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, hazardous_factor = #{hazardousFactor}, issuance_reason = #{issuanceReason}, notes = #{notes}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_issuance SET received_signature = 1, signature_date = GETDATE(), modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_issuance SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
